title: tilt up + verify dashboard live with real data, pixel-check vs design
acceptance_criteria: tilt up brings postgres+api+web healthy; dashboard loads at localhost:4200 with all 9 tiles rendering (no blanks); weather REAL; events seeded; HA tiles real-or-graceful; screenshot saved docs/screenshots/dashboard.png; visually matches the Evee Dashboard design.
